section_or_regulation: s178 s179 s198 s163 RTRA 1984 s121A Avon Order and Bristol constitution
operative_requirement: licensing scheme must be made by source-supported authority through source-supported internal route
interpretation: Bristol-led authority status and OBC progression FBC member route are controlled but final order-maker and submitter remain unresolved
scheme_implication: confirm final WPL order-maker statutory submitter and signatory before order or submission readiness
required_evidence: Stage 2C authority chain Stage 2D route map WECA role evidence legal Monitoring Officer route confirmation and future committee resolutions
decision: final order-maker and submitter not settled

operative_requirement: licensing scheme order requires confirmation before effect and Secretary of State is appropriate national authority for England-only schemes
interpretation: initial England route requires Secretary of State confirmation
scheme_implication: confirm initial order submission decision-maker and collect DfT procedural expectations
required_evidence: current law route map and DfT process evidence

operative_requirement: RPI-only variation exemption from confirmation
interpretation: narrow exemption not for initial order
scheme_implication: prevent misapplication to initial Bristol scheme
required_evidence: current regulation text and legal review

operative_requirement: scheme order contents include area times charges duration
interpretation: scheme design must map to order clauses
scheme_implication: define clause-by-clause scheme order matrix
required_evidence: scheme order drafting instructions

legal_source: Transport Act 2000 Schedule 12 and Net Proceeds Regulations 2003
operative_requirement: net proceeds plans programmes and accounting controls required
interpretation: financial case must reconcile gross income costs net proceeds and plans
scheme_implication: financial case must include net proceeds plans and accounting policy
required_evidence: ten year general plan five year detailed programme accounting policy

operative_requirement: WECA MCA role may affect powers assurance consent or funding
interpretation: current role unresolved and cannot be inferred from strategy
scheme_implication: WECA MCA role must be resolved before route conclusion
required_evidence: acquire current WECA MCA and Bristol governance evidence

operative_requirement: licence charge liability may sit with non-occupier parking provider where qualifying arrangements exist
interpretation: liable party cannot be assumed to be occupier in all cases
scheme_implication: licensing model must capture occupier provider arrangement and evidence
required_evidence: licence-record schema provider evidence and liability basis

operative_requirement: penalty charges may apply to unlicensed parking excess licensed places and licence-condition breach
interpretation: penalty design must map each contravention to evidence and liable party
scheme_implication: enforcement model must capture event type licensed maximum exempt vehicles and condition breach evidence
required_evidence: enforcement-event schema and operating procedure

operative_requirement: penalty charge notices require prescribed content and service on liable person
interpretation: PCN templates must include amount circumstances date time payment period method representation grounds increased charge and address
scheme_implication: build PCN template and service controls before operations design
required_evidence: PCN template service policy and QA checklist

operative_requirement: representations require consideration of supporting evidence and written decision
interpretation: representation workflow is procedural fairness control
scheme_implication: operating model must capture grounds evidence decision and notice of rejection
required_evidence: representations workflow and decision records

operative_requirement: appeals are to county court and unpaid penalties may progress to charge certificate and court-order recovery
interpretation: enforcement case model must support appeal recovery and cancellation outcomes
scheme_implication: define appeals recovery and accounting procedure
required_evidence: enforcement-event schema appeals recovery fields and finance procedure

operative_requirement: notices may be served by specified methods including agreed electronic communication
interpretation: service address and communication consent must be controlled
scheme_implication: define notice service policy and evidence of service
required_evidence: service policy and notice log

legal_source: Road User Charging and WPL Classes of Motor Vehicles Regulations 2001
operative_requirement: vehicle classes must use specified classes and avoid incompatible mass and axle bases
interpretation: charge or exemption design by vehicle class must use statutory classes
scheme_implication: vehicle-class assumptions cannot be free text
required_evidence: vehicle class table linked to scheme order and licensing system

legal_source: Bristol governance decision notices and minutes
operative_requirement: public decision trail supports Stage One OBC development and later update-only status
interpretation: no current approval for implementation statutory consultation FBC preferred scheme boundary charge thresholds exemptions order-making or submission
scheme_implication: keep scheme parameters as assumptions until later formal decision
required_evidence: decision notices minutes Stage 2D route map and future committee papers

legal_source: Transport Act 2000 and DfT process controls
operative_requirement: confirmation is a formal statutory decision and engagement is not confirmation
interpretation: DfT contact may evidence expectations only if classified
scheme_implication: record each interaction as informal engagement policy expectation procedural requirement formal decision or confirmation material
required_evidence: DfT engagement log and formal confirmation evidence

section_or_regulation: current WECA MCA law constitution delegations and decision records
operative_requirement: strategic alignment does not prove formal support consent objection or no role
interpretation: WECA role must be classified before promoter route conclusion
scheme_implication: route conclusion remains blocked until role is evidenced
required_evidence: consolidated function map constitution meeting-record search and support-status classifier

operative_requirement: annual accounts and deficit surplus controls required
interpretation: relevant scheme accounts must be kept and statements prepared
scheme_implication: financial model and ledger must support annual statutory account
required_evidence: net proceeds account design annual statement template audit trail

operative_requirement: net proceeds must be applied for permitted transport-policy purposes
interpretation: net proceeds cannot be treated as general revenue
scheme_implication: transport investment package must link to local transport policies
required_evidence: local transport policy case and investment programme

operative_requirement: opening ten year general plan required for relevant schemes
interpretation: scheme order dossier must include a general plan
scheme_implication: prepare ten year general plan before submission readiness
required_evidence: ten year general plan

operative_requirement: opening five year detailed programme required for relevant schemes
interpretation: scheme order dossier must include detailed programme
scheme_implication: prepare five year programme before submission readiness
required_evidence: five year detailed programme

legal_source: Road User Charging and WPL Net Proceeds Regulations 2003
operative_requirement: amounts received expenses and attribution determined on accruals basis with proper practices
interpretation: financial model must track receipts costs interest capital financing depreciation impairment refunds and bad debt
scheme_implication: create accounting policy and reconciliation to statutory account
required_evidence: accounting policy model card and finance QA

section_or_regulation: formative consultation principles and Transport Act consultation mapping
operative_requirement: consultation must be formative and conscientiously considered
interpretation: consultation materials must keep open questions open and record response analysis
scheme_implication: consultation launch remains blocked until compliance pack exists
required_evidence: consultation compliance table accessibility pack and decision-maker response report

section_or_regulation: public law rationality fairness vires and evidence sufficiency
operative_requirement: open P0/P1 issues must remain visible to decision makers
interpretation: gate report must prohibit overclaiming legal readiness
scheme_implication: decision-makers must see vires evidence gaps and residual risks
required_evidence: judicial review risk register and issue resolution log
